```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|87522002,http://snomed.info/sct|271737000&_include=Condition:patient
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|310325&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|718-7&value-quantity=lt12||g/dL&_include=Observation:patient
```

---

### Query Breakdown

| # | Resource | Intent | Key Parameter |
|---|----------|--------|---------------|
| 1 | `Condition` | IDA (`87522002`) **or** general anemia (`271737000`) dx | Comma = OR across both SNOMED codes |
| 2 | `MedicationRequest` | Ferrous sulfate Rx | RxNorm `310325` |
| 3 | `Observation` | Hemoglobin **< 12 g/dL** | LOINC `718-7`, `value-quantity=lt12||g/dL` |

---

### Union Logic (Post-Query)

```
PatientIDs =
  patients(Condition results)
  ∪ patients(MedicationRequest results)
  ∪ patients(Observation results)
```

- Extract `subject.reference` (or `patient.reference`) from each result bundle
- **Deduplicate** across all three sets
- Any patient appearing in **at least one** query is included in the final cohort

---

### Notes
- `_include=*:patient` is added to pull `Patient` resources in the same bundle, avoiding a second round-trip
- For stricter **Iron-Deficiency Anemia only**, prefer `87522002` and drop `271737000`, or intersect instead of union
- Hemoglobin threshold of **12 g/dL** covers both female and pediatric thresholds; adjust to `lt13` for male-specific cutoff if needed
- Ensure the server supports `value-quantity` with unit comparisons; some servers require `value-quantity=lt12` without the unit suffix
